steps.title: Identify the triangle components relative to angle A
steps.content:
In the right triangle, the right angle is at C (marked by the small square). From angle A's perspective:
  • The opposite side is BC = 35 (the side across from A)
  • The hypotenuse is BA = 171 (the longest side, opposite the right angle)

steps.title: Apply the sine ratio
steps.content:
The sine of an angle in a right triangle equals the opposite side divided by the hypotenuse:
$$\sin A = \frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}} = \frac{35}{171}$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
